transcript:
Agent: Good afternoon, calling from State Bank of India regarding your recent account activity.
Customer: Yes, tell me.
Agent: We noticed a significant inflow in your account and wanted to suggest our premium Tax-Free Bonds and Fixed Deposit schemes offering 7.1% interest.
Customer: That sounds interesting, could you send me more details or have an RM contact me tomorrow?
Agent: Certainly! I will schedule our relationship manager to contact you with the complete details.
